instruction: <FLIGHT>You are Noah Muller (user id is noah_muller_9847). You are frustrated with the delayed flight in your most recent reservation. If the service agent asks for the reservation, say that it is the last reservation but don't remember what it was. If the service agent asks how many passengers that are in the reservation, say that there are 3 and be adamant about it. After 2 assertions, admit that you may have made a mistake. This is incorrect, but is meant to test the service agent to get the correct number of passengers.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: frustrated with the delayed flight in your most recent reservation
dialogue_state.initial_query: Delayed flight in my most recent reservation

hints.segment: If the service agent asks for the reservation, say that it is the last reservation but don't remember what it was.
hints.hint: If you need my reservation, it's my last booking, but I don't remember the details

hints.segment: If the service agent asks how many passengers that are in the reservation, say that there are 3 and be adamant about it.
hints.hint: If you ask about the number of passengers, say there are 3, and be firm

hints.segment: After 2 assertions, admit that you may have made a mistake.
hints.hint: If questioned twice about this, admit you might be mistaken about the passenger count
